questions.statement:
<p>If P denotes &lsquo;&times;&rsquo;, Q denotes &lsquo;&divide;&rsquo;, R denotes &lsquo;+&rsquo;, and S denotes &lsquo;&minus;&rsquo;, then what will come in place of &lsquo;?&rsquo; in the following equation?</p>

<p>94 R 16 Q 2 P 7 S 64 R 13 P 2 = ?</p>

<p>If A denotes &lsquo;+&rsquo;, B denotes &lsquo;&times;&rsquo;, C denotes &lsquo;&minus;&rsquo;, and D denotes &lsquo;&divide;&rsquo;, then what will be the value of the following equation?</p>

<p>22 B 13 C 120 D 30 A 42 = ?</p>
If &#39;A&#39; means &#39;+&#39;, &#39;B&#39; means &#39;-&#39;, &#39;C&#39; means &#39;x&#39; and &#39;D&#39; means &#39;&divide;&#39;, then 81 D 9 C 5 D 15 A 8 B 11 = ?

<p>If &#39;A&#39; stands for &#39;&divide;&#39;, &#39;B&#39; stands for &#39;&times;&#39;, &#39;C&#39; stands for &#39;+&#39; and &#39;D&#39; stands for &#39;-&#39;, what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation?</p>

<p>114 C 85 A 5 B 4 D 33 = ?</p>

<p>If &lsquo;+&rsquo; means &lsquo;-&rsquo;, &lsquo;&divide;&rsquo; means &lsquo;+&rsquo;, &lsquo;-&rsquo; means &lsquo;&times;&rsquo;, and &lsquo;&times;&lsquo; means &lsquo;&divide;&rsquo;. Which of the following will be the value of the expression?</p>

<div>81 &times; 9 + 21 - 7 &divide; 147</div>
